'''[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Tritum XI''' was the [[High Lord]] of [[House Mecetti]] around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. He realized that there was a risk of inbreeding within his [[Tapani Noble Houses|house]] and sought a noble suitor outside of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. He selected [[Viscount (title)/Legends|Viscountess]] [[Mireya]] from [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] who brought with her [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] teachings that were subtly integrated into the rituals of the [[Mecrosa Order]].
